headline: Dan Aykroyd Resurrects Ghostbusters Universe in Netflix Animated Expansion
lede: Original Ghostbusters mastermind Dan Aykroyd is bringing his paranormal franchise back to life, this time in animated form for Netflix's growing animation slate.
body:
Netflix and Sony Pictures Animation are set to electrify the streaming landscape with a bold animated series that promises to expand the beloved Ghostbusters mythology. Dan Aykroyd, the original writer and star who defined supernatural comedy in the 1980s, will executive produce the new animated venture.

The project signals a strategic pivot for the Ghostbusters brand, which has historically relied on live-action formats. By embracing animation, the franchise can explore more expansive storytelling possibilities and potentially attract a younger generation of fans eager for supernatural adventures.

Sony Pictures Animation has demonstrated significant animation prowess with critically acclaimed titles like *Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse*, positioning this Ghostbusters series for potential breakthrough success. Netflix continues its aggressive animation strategy, leveraging beloved IP to capture global audience attention.

While specific plot details remain under wraps, industry insiders anticipate the series will honor the original film's comedic spirit while introducing fresh supernatural narratives. The involvement of Aykroyd suggests a commitment to maintaining the franchise's distinctive tone and humor.
key_facts: Dan Aykroyd returns as executive producer
Netflix and Sony Pictures Animation collaboration
